datasets.name: 69ebd6fc
queryLines:
-- CTE for pricing information
WITH pricing AS (
  select
    pricing.effective_list.default as price,
    price_start_time,
    sku_name,
    COALESCE(price_end_time, NOW()) as price_end_time
  from
    system.billing.list_prices p
),

-- CTE for usage data with user name extraction, serving details, and dollar calculation
endpoint_usage AS (
SELECT
    u.record_id,
    u.usage_quantity * price as dollar_cost,
    --endpoint_name field was added in June 2024, previously it was null
    IF(
      u.usage_metadata.endpoint_name IS NULL,
      'not populated',
      u.usage_metadata.endpoint_name
    ) AS endpoint_name,
    u.usage_metadata.endpoint_id,
    u.usage_quantity,
    u.usage_start_time,
    u.usage_end_time,
    u.usage_date,
    u.usage_type,
    CASE
      WHEN u.product_features.serving_type = "FOUNDATION_MODEL" AND u.product_features.model_serving.offering_type = "BATCH_INFERENCE" THEN "BATCH_INFERENCE"
      WHEN u.product_features.serving_type = "FOUNDATION_MODEL" AND u.usage_type = "TOKEN" THEN "PAY_PER_TOKEN"
      WHEN u.product_features.serving_type = "FOUNDATION_MODEL" AND u.usage_type = "COMPUTE_TIME" THEN "PROVISIONED_THROUGHPUT"
      WHEN u.product_features.serving_type = "MODEL" THEN "CPU_MODEL"
      ELSE u.product_features.serving_type
    END AS serving_type,
    u.custom_tags,
    TRANSFORM(
      MAP_KEYS(custom_tags),
      (k, i) -> CONCAT(k, '=', MAP_VALUES(custom_tags) [i])
    ) AS key_value_tags,
    CASE 
      WHEN REGEXP_REPLACE(
        u.identity_metadata.run_as,
        '([a-zA-Z]+)\\.([a-zA-Z]+)@.*',
        '$1 $2'
      ) = u.identity_metadata.run_as THEN u.identity_metadata.run_as
      ELSE INITCAP(
        REGEXP_REPLACE(
          u.identity_metadata.run_as,
          '([a-zA-Z]+)\\.([a-zA-Z]+)@.*',
          '$1 $2'
        )
      )
    END AS user_name_cleaned,
    u.account_id,
    u.workspace_id,
    w.workspace_name,
    u.usage_metadata,
    u.billing_origin_product
  FROM
    system.billing.usage u
    INNER JOIN pricing p ON p.sku_name = u.sku_name
    LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON u.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
    AND u.usage_start_time BETWEEN p.price_start_time AND p.price_end_time
  WHERE
    u.billing_origin_product = 'MODEL_SERVING'
    AND usage_date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date
    AND (
      :tags = 'All'
      OR array_contains(
        TRANSFORM(
          MAP_KEYS(custom_tags), (k, i) -> CONCAT(
            lower(k),
            '=',
            lower(MAP_VALUES(custom_tags)[i])
          )
        ),
        :tags
      )
    )
),

-- CTE to get top 10 endpoints by usage quantity
top_endpoints AS (
  SELECT
    account_id,
    workspace_id,
    endpoint_id,
    SUM(dollar_cost) AS total_cost,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(dollar_cost) DESC) AS endpoint_cost_topN
  FROM
    endpoint_usage
  GROUP BY
    account_id, workspace_id, endpoint_id
)

-- Final query with grouping for top endpoints and users
SELECT 
  uwn.record_id,
  uwn.account_id,
  uwn.workspace_id,
  uwn.workspace_name,
  uwn.usage_date,
  uwn.usage_quantity,
  uwn.key_value_tags,
  uwn.custom_tags,
  uwn.endpoint_id,
  uwn.endpoint_name,
  uwn.user_name_cleaned AS user,
  uwn.usage_start_time, 
  uwn.usage_end_time,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, uwn.usage_start_time, uwn.usage_end_time) AS duration_minutes,
  te.endpoint_cost_topN,
  uwn.serving_type,
  uwn.usage_quantity AS DBUs,
  uwn.dollar_cost  -- Include dollar cost in the final output
FROM endpoint_usage uwn
INNER JOIN top_endpoints te 
  ON uwn.endpoint_id = te.endpoint_id
  AND uwn.account_id = te.account_id
  AND uwn.workspace_id = te.workspace_id

datasets.name: 3ac0c15e
queryLines:
-- CTE to fetch request details, including token counts and request time
WITH latest_served_entities AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY served_entity_id, endpoint_id, account_id, workspace_id
      ORDER BY change_time DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM
    system.serving.served_entities
  QUALIFY rn = 1
), 

endpoint_metadata AS 
(
SELECT 
  endpoint_id,
  endpoint_name, 
  entity_type, 
  entity_name,
  served_entity_name,
  task, 
  endpoint_usage.account_id, 
  endpoint_usage.workspace_id, 
  w.workspace_name,
  databricks_request_id,
  CASE 
      WHEN requester NOT LIKE '%@%' then requester
      WHEN REGEXP_REPLACE(
        requester,
        '([a-zA-Z]+)\\.([a-zA-Z]+)@.*',
        '$1 $2'
      ) = requester THEN requester
      ELSE INITCAP(
        REGEXP_REPLACE(
          requester,
          '([a-zA-Z]+)\\.([a-zA-Z]+)@.*',
          '$1 $2'
        )
      )
    END AS requester_name_cleaned,
  endpoint_usage.input_token_count, 
  endpoint_usage.output_token_count, 
  (endpoint_usage.output_token_count + endpoint_usage.input_token_count) as total_token_count, 
  endpoint_usage.request_time  
FROM system.serving.endpoint_usage AS endpoint_usage
JOIN latest_served_entities as served_entities
ON served_entities.served_entity_id = endpoint_usage.served_entity_id
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON served_entities.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
WHERE 
 DATE(endpoint_usage.request_time) BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date
),

-- CTE to get top 10 users by usage quantity
top_users AS (
  SELECT
    account_id, 
    workspace_id,
    endpoint_id,
    requester_name_cleaned AS user,
    SUM(total_token_count) AS total_tokens,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT databricks_request_id) DESC) AS user_tokens_topN
  FROM
    endpoint_metadata
  GROUP BY
    account_id, 
    workspace_id,
    endpoint_id,
    requester_name_cleaned 
)

SELECT em.*, 
  tu.user_tokens_topN
FROM endpoint_metadata em
INNER JOIN top_users tu
  ON em.endpoint_id = tu.endpoint_id
  AND em.account_id = tu.account_id
  AND em.workspace_id = tu.workspace_id
  AND em.requester_name_cleaned = tu.user

datasets.name: 890d3156
queryLines:
WITH latest_warehouse_metadata AS (
  SELECT *,
   ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY workspace_id, warehouse_id 
      ORDER BY change_time DESC
      ) AS rn
  FROM system.compute.warehouses w
  QUALIFY rn = 1 -- Get more recent warehouse snapshot
),

latest_pipeline_metadata AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY workspace_id, pipeline_id 
      ORDER BY change_time DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM
    system.lakeflow.pipelines
  QUALIFY rn = 1 -- Get more recent dlt snapshot
  ),

latest_job_metadata AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY workspace_id, job_id 
      ORDER BY change_time DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM
    system.lakeflow.jobs
  QUALIFY rn = 1 -- Get more recent job snapshot
),

latest_cluster_metadata AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY workspace_id, cluster_id 
      ORDER BY change_time DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM
    system.compute.clusters
  QUALIFY rn = 1 -- Get more recent cluster snapshot
),

dbsql_batch_inference_usage_data AS (
  SELECT 
    u.account_id,
    u.workspace_id,
    u.record_id,
    u.sku_name,
    u.cloud,
    u.usage_start_time,
    u.usage_end_time,
    u.usage_date,
    u.custom_tags,
    u.usage_unit,
    u.usage_quantity,
    u.usage_metadata,
    u.identity_metadata.run_as AS user_email,
    u.record_type,
    u.ingestion_date,
    u.billing_origin_product,
    u.product_features,
    u.usage_type,
    'dbsql' AS executing_compute
  FROM system.billing.usage u
    JOIN latest_warehouse_metadata x
      ON u.workspace_id = x.workspace_id
      AND u.usage_metadata.warehouse_id = x.warehouse_id
  WHERE u.billing_origin_product = 'MODEL_SERVING'
    AND u.product_features.model_serving.offering_type = 'BATCH_INFERENCE'
),

dlt_batch_inference_usage_data AS (
  SELECT 
    u.account_id,
    u.workspace_id,
    u.record_id,
    u.sku_name,
    u.cloud,
    u.usage_start_time,
    u.usage_end_time,
    u.usage_date,
    u.custom_tags,
    u.usage_unit,
    u.usage_quantity,
    u.usage_metadata,
    u.identity_metadata.run_as AS user_email,
    u.record_type,
    u.ingestion_date,
    u.billing_origin_product,
    u.product_features,
    u.usage_type,
    'dlt' AS executing_compute
  FROM system.billing.usage u
    JOIN latest_pipeline_metadata x
      ON u.workspace_id = x.workspace_id
      AND u.usage_metadata.dlt_pipeline_id = x.pipeline_id
  WHERE u.billing_origin_product = 'MODEL_SERVING'
    AND u.product_features.model_serving.offering_type = 'BATCH_INFERENCE'
),

jobs_batch_inference_usage_data AS (
  SELECT 
    u.account_id,
    u.workspace_id,
    u.record_id,
    u.sku_name,
    u.cloud,
    u.usage_start_time,
    u.usage_end_time,
    u.usage_date,
    u.custom_tags,
    u.usage_unit,
    u.usage_quantity,
    u.usage_metadata,
    u.identity_metadata.run_as AS user_email,
    u.record_type,
    u.ingestion_date,
    u.billing_origin_product,
    u.product_features,
    u.usage_type,
    'jobs' AS executing_compute
  FROM system.billing.usage u
    JOIN latest_job_metadata x
      ON u.workspace_id = x.workspace_id
      AND u.usage_metadata.job_id = x.job_id
  WHERE u.billing_origin_product = 'MODEL_SERVING'
    AND u.product_features.model_serving.offering_type = 'BATCH_INFERENCE'
),

cluster_batch_inference_usage_data AS (
  SELECT 
    u.account_id,
    u.workspace_id,
    u.record_id,
    u.sku_name,
    u.cloud,
    u.usage_start_time,
    u.usage_end_time,
    u.usage_date,
    u.custom_tags,
    u.usage_unit,
    u.usage_quantity,
    u.usage_metadata,
    u.identity_metadata.run_as AS user_email,
    u.record_type,
    u.ingestion_date,
    u.billing_origin_product,
    u.product_features,
    u.usage_type,
    'all_purpose' AS executing_compute
  FROM system.billing.usage u
    JOIN latest_cluster_metadata x
      ON u.workspace_id = x.workspace_id
      AND u.usage_metadata.cluster_id = x.cluster_id
  WHERE u.billing_origin_product = 'MODEL_SERVING'
    AND u.product_features.model_serving.offering_type = 'BATCH_INFERENCE'
    AND u.usage_metadata.job_id IS NULL
    AND u.usage_metadata.dlt_pipeline_id IS NULL
    AND u.usage_metadata.warehouse_id IS NULL 
),

batch_inference_usage_data AS (
SELECT 
  account_id,
  workspace_id,
  record_id,
  sku_name,
  cloud,
  usage_start_time,
  usage_end_time,
  usage_date,
  custom_tags,
  usage_unit,
  usage_quantity,
  usage_metadata,
  user_email,
  record_type,
  ingestion_date,
  billing_origin_product,
  product_features,
  usage_type,
  executing_compute
FROM dbsql_batch_inference_usage_data
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  account_id,
  workspace_id,
  record_id,
  sku_name,
  cloud,
  usage_start_time,
  usage_end_time,
  usage_date,
  custom_tags,
  usage_unit,
  usage_quantity,
  usage_metadata,
  user_email,
  record_type,
  ingestion_date,
  billing_origin_product,
  product_features,
  usage_type,
  executing_compute
FROM dlt_batch_inference_usage_data
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  account_id,
  workspace_id,
  record_id,
  sku_name,
  cloud,
  usage_start_time,
  usage_end_time,
  usage_date,
  custom_tags,
  usage_unit,
  usage_quantity,
  usage_metadata,
  user_email,
  record_type,
  ingestion_date,
  billing_origin_product,
  product_features,
  usage_type,
  executing_compute
FROM jobs_batch_inference_usage_data
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  account_id,
  workspace_id,
  record_id,
  sku_name,
  cloud,
  usage_start_time,
  usage_end_time,
  usage_date,
  custom_tags,
  usage_unit,
  usage_quantity,
  usage_metadata,
  user_email,
  record_type,
  ingestion_date,
  billing_origin_product,
  product_features,
  usage_type,
  executing_compute
FROM cluster_batch_inference_usage_data
),

-- CTE to get top 10 users by usage quantity
top_users AS (
  SELECT
    account_id,
    workspace_id,
    user_email,
    SUM(usage_quantity) AS total_usage_quantity,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(usage_quantity) DESC) AS user_usage_topN
  FROM
    batch_inference_usage_data
  GROUP BY
    account_id, workspace_id, user_email
)

SELECT uwn.*, tu.user_usage_topN 
FROM batch_inference_usage_data uwn
INNER JOIN top_users tu 
  ON uwn.user_email = tu.user_email
  AND uwn.account_id = tu.account_id
  AND uwn.workspace_id = tu.workspace_id

datasets.name: cae4cb6b
queryLines:
-- -- Per-Model Token Usage and Cost Breakdown
-- -- Provides comprehensive analysis of token usage and estimated costs by model
-- SELECT 
--     se.served_entity_name,
--     se.entity_name as model_name,
--     se.entity_type,
--     COUNT(*) as total_requests,
--     SUM(eu.input_token_count) as total_input_tokens,
--     SUM(eu.output_token_count) as total_output_tokens,
--     SUM(eu.input_token_count + eu.output_token_count) as total_tokens,
--     AVG(eu.input_token_count) as avg_input_tokens_per_request,
--     AVG(eu.output_token_count) as avg_output_tokens_per_request,
    
--     -- Calculate estimated costs based on billing usage table
--     SUM(bu.usage_quantity) as total_dbus_consumed,
    
--     -- Cost per token calculations (approximate)
--     CASE 
--         WHEN SUM(eu.input_token_count + eu.output_token_count) > 0 
--         THEN SUM(bu.usage_quantity) / SUM(eu.input_token_count + eu.output_token_count) * 1000000
--         ELSE NULL
--     END as estimated_dbu_per_million_tokens,
    
--     DATE_TRUNC('day', eu.request_time) as usage_date
    
-- FROM system.serving.endpoint_usage eu
-- JOIN system.serving.served_entities se 
--     ON eu.served_entity_id = se.served_entity_id
-- LEFT JOIN system.billing.usage bu 
--     ON bu.usage_metadata.endpoint_name = se.endpoint_name
--     AND bu.billing_origin_product = 'MODEL_SERVING'
--     AND DATE(bu.usage_date) = DATE(eu.request_time)
    
-- WHERE eu.request_time BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date
--     AND eu.status_code = 200  -- Only successful requests
    
-- GROUP BY 
--     se.served_entity_name,
--     se.entity_name,
--     se.entity_type,
--     DATE_TRUNC('day', eu.request_time)
    
-- ORDER BY total_tokens DESC, usage_date DESC;

WITH goose_data AS (
    SELECT 
         DATE(b.request_time) as dte, date_trunc('HOUR', b.request_time) as dte_hr, request_time, a.served_entity_name, a.endpoint_name, a.endpoint_id, b.*,
         CASE
         WHEN a.served_entity_name LIKE "%-4%"  AND a.served_entity_name LIKE "%claud%" THEN 'claude-4'
         WHEN a.served_entity_name LIKE "%3-7%" THEN 'claude-3-7'
         WHEN a.served_entity_name LIKE "%3-5%" THEN 'claude-3-5'
         WHEN a.served_entity_name LIKE "%gemini%" THEN 'gemini'
         WHEN a.served_entity_name LIKE "%gemma" THEN 'gemma'
         WHEN a.served_entity_name LIKE "%o1%" OR a.served_entity_name LIKE "%o4%" OR a.served_entity_name LIKE "%o2%" OR  a.served_entity_name LIKE "%gpt%" THEN 'openai'
         WHEN a.served_entity_name LIKE "%llama%" THEN 'llama'
         ELSE "other"
         END AS family
    FROM system.serving.served_entities AS a
    LEFT JOIN system.serving.endpoint_usage b 
        ON a.served_entity_id = b.served_entity_id
     AND DATE(b.request_time) >= '2025-05-15')
--SELECT dte_hr, entity_name, status_code, count(status_code) as num_occurences FROM goose_data group by all order by dte_hr, num_occurences desc
SELECT date_trunc('DAY', dte) as mnth, family, sum(input_token_count + output_token_count) as total_tokens FROM goose_data group by ALL order by mnth desc

datasets.name: d1d931ca
queryLines:
WITH ai_query_history AS (
  SELECT *, 'ai_query' AS ai_function_name
  FROM system.query.history 
  WHERE statement_text LIKE '%ai_query%' 
    AND (statement_text LIKE '%databricks-meta-llama%' 
         OR statement_text LIKE '%databricks-claude%')
    AND statement_type = 'SELECT'
    AND statement_text NOT LIKE '%system generated%' 
    AND execution_status = 'FINISHED'
),
ai_classify AS (
  SELECT *, 'ai_classify' AS ai_function_name
  FROM system.query.history 
  WHERE statement_text LIKE '%ai_classify%' 
    AND (statement_text LIKE '%databricks-meta-llama%' 
         OR statement_text LIKE '%databricks-claude%')
    AND statement_type = 'SELECT'
    AND statement_text NOT LIKE '%system generated%' 
    AND execution_status = 'FINISHED'
),
ai_extract AS (
  SELECT *, 'ai_extract' AS ai_function_name
  FROM system.query.history 
  WHERE statement_text LIKE '%ai_extract%' 
    AND (statement_text LIKE '%databricks-meta-llama%' 
         OR statement_text LIKE '%databricks-claude%')
    AND statement_type = 'SELECT'
    AND statement_text NOT LIKE '%system generated%' 
    AND execution_status = 'FINISHED'
),
ai_analyze_sentiment AS (
  SELECT *, 'ai_analyze_sentiment' AS ai_function_name
  FROM system.query.history 
  WHERE statement_text LIKE '%ai_analyze_sentiment%' 
    AND (statement_text LIKE '%databricks-meta-llama%' 
         OR statement_text LIKE '%databricks-claude%')
    AND statement_type = 'SELECT'
    AND statement_text NOT LIKE '%system generated%' 
    AND execution_status = 'FINISHED'
),
ai_fix_grammar AS (
  SELECT *, 'ai_fix_grammar' AS ai_function_name
  FROM system.query.history 
  WHERE statement_text LIKE '%ai_fix_grammar%' 
    AND (statement_text LIKE '%databricks-meta-llama%' 
         OR statement_text LIKE '%databricks-claude%')
    AND statement_type = 'SELECT'
    AND statement_text NOT LIKE '%system generated%' 
    AND execution_status = 'FINISHED'
),
ai_forecast AS (
  SELECT *, 'ai_forecast' AS ai_function_name
  FROM system.query.history 
  WHERE statement_text LIKE '%ai_forecast%' 
    AND (statement_text LIKE '%databricks-meta-llama%' 
         OR statement_text LIKE '%databricks-claude%')
    AND statement_type = 'SELECT'
    AND statement_text NOT LIKE '%system generated%' 
    AND execution_status = 'FINISHED'
),
ai_gen AS (
  SELECT *, 'ai_gen' AS ai_function_name
  FROM system.query.history 
  WHERE statement_text LIKE '%ai_gen%' 
    AND (statement_text LIKE '%databricks-meta-llama%' 
         OR statement_text LIKE '%databricks-claude%')
    AND statement_type = 'SELECT'
    AND statement_text NOT LIKE '%system generated%' 
    AND execution_status = 'FINISHED'
),
ai_generate_text AS (
  SELECT *, 'ai_generate_text' AS ai_function_name
  FROM system.query.history 
  WHERE statement_text LIKE '%ai_generate_text%' 
    AND (statement_text LIKE '%databricks-meta-llama%' 
         OR statement_text LIKE '%databricks-claude%')
    AND statement_type = 'SELECT'
    AND statement_text NOT LIKE '%system generated%' 
    AND execution_status = 'FINISHED'
),
ai_mask AS (
  SELECT *, 'ai_mask' AS ai_function_name
  FROM system.query.history 
  WHERE statement_text LIKE '%ai_mask%' 
    AND (statement_text LIKE '%databricks-meta-llama%' 
         OR statement_text LIKE '%databricks-claude%')
    AND statement_type = 'SELECT'
    AND statement_text NOT LIKE '%system generated%' 
    AND execution_status = 'FINISHED'
),
ai_similarity AS (
  SELECT *, 'ai_similarity' AS ai_function_name
  FROM system.query.history 
  WHERE statement_text LIKE '%ai_similarity%' 
    AND (statement_text LIKE '%databricks-meta-llama%' 
         OR statement_text LIKE '%databricks-claude%')
    AND statement_type = 'SELECT'
    AND statement_text NOT LIKE '%system generated%' 
    AND execution_status = 'FINISHED'
),
ai_translate AS (
  SELECT *, 'ai_translate' AS ai_function_name
  FROM system.query.history 
  WHERE statement_text LIKE '%ai_translate%' 
    AND (statement_text LIKE '%databricks-meta-llama%' 
         OR statement_text LIKE '%databricks-claude%')
    AND statement_type = 'SELECT'
    AND statement_text NOT LIKE '%system generated%' 
    AND execution_status = 'FINISHED'
),
ai_summarize AS (
  SELECT *, 'ai_summarize' AS ai_function_name
  FROM system.query.history 
  WHERE statement_text LIKE '%ai_summarize%' 
    AND (statement_text LIKE '%databricks-meta-llama%' 
         OR statement_text LIKE '%databricks-claude%')
    AND statement_type = 'SELECT'
    AND statement_text NOT LIKE '%system generated%' 
    AND execution_status = 'FINISHED'
)
SELECT * 
FROM ai_query_history
UNION ALL
SELECT * 
FROM ai_classify
UNION ALL
SELECT * 
FROM ai_extract
UNION ALL
SELECT * 
FROM ai_analyze_sentiment
UNION ALL
SELECT * 
FROM ai_fix_grammar
UNION ALL
SELECT * 
FROM ai_forecast
UNION ALL
SELECT * 
FROM ai_gen
UNION ALL
SELECT * 
FROM ai_generate_text
UNION ALL
SELECT * 
FROM ai_mask
UNION ALL
SELECT * 
FROM ai_similarity
UNION ALL
SELECT * 
FROM ai_translate
UNION ALL
SELECT * 
FROM ai_summarize

datasets.name: a2e0bcd5
queryLines:
SELECT
  event_time,
  DATE(event_time) AS event_date,
  endpoint_name,
  destination_name,
  destination_model,
  requester,
  api_type,
  input_tokens,
  output_tokens,
  total_tokens,
  latency_ms,
  time_to_first_byte_ms,
  status_code,
  workspace_id
FROM
  system.ai_gateway.usage
WHERE
  destination_type = 'PAY_PER_TOKEN_FOUNDATION_MODEL'
  AND event_time >= :date_range.min
  AND event_time < :date_range.max + INTERVAL 1 DAY

datasets.name: 5e969dd4
queryLines:
WITH pricing AS (
  SELECT
    pricing.effective_list.default AS price,
    price_start_time,
    sku_name,
    COALESCE(price_end_time, NOW()) AS price_end_time
  FROM
    system.billing.list_prices
)
SELECT
  u.usage_date,
  u.sku_name,
  u.usage_metadata.endpoint_name AS endpoint_name,
  u.usage_quantity,
  u.usage_quantity * p.price AS dollar_cost,
  u.workspace_id
FROM
  system.billing.usage u
    INNER JOIN pricing p
      ON p.sku_name = u.sku_name
      AND u.usage_start_time BETWEEN p.price_start_time AND p.price_end_time
WHERE
  u.billing_origin_product = 'MODEL_SERVING'
  AND u.product_features.serving_type = 'FOUNDATION_MODEL'
  AND u.usage_type = 'TOKEN'
  AND u.usage_date BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
